steps.title: Use the confirming data
steps.content: The linguist assumes that own appears often in written English. The corpus data supports that assumption by showing that own is the eighth most commonly used adjective, so the blank needs a word meaning confirm with evidence.

steps.title: Reject opposing meanings
steps.content: B means disprove, which conflicts with the confirming data. C means rearrange, and D means imply as a necessary result; neither describes using evidence to support an assumption. The answer is A.
